creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
On Fri, Jul 25, 2008 at 05:14:47PM -0400, Greg Larkin wrote:
> Hi Sunpoet,
> 
> Thank you for your PR.  I have reviewed your patch and made some minor
> changes:
> 
> - Used macro for MASTER_SITES location.
> 
> - Removed conditional equivalence on MAINTAINER variable.
> 
> - Simplified the PORTDOCS installation.
> 
> - Changed the post-patch target to post-configure and modify the
> configured Makefile, instead of Makefile.in.  If you wouldn't mind
> checking that change in particular, I would appreciate it.  The reason I
> made the change is because the Makefile.in did not contain the -lpthread
> search string that the REINPLACE_CMD was looking for.
> 
> - Rewrapped pkg-descr with fmt to the default width.
> 
> When you have a chance, please review the diff between my patch and the
> one you filed with the PR:
> 
> http://people.freebsd.org/~glarkin/diffs/tintin%2b%2b-devel-vs-submitted.diff
> 
> If you need it, this is a diff of my patch vs. the CVS repository:
> 
> http://people.freebsd.org/~glarkin/diffs/tintin%2b%2b-devel-vs-CVS.diff
> 
> Let me know what you think, and if the changes look good to you, I'll
> send them to my mentor for approval.
> 
> Best regards,
> Greg
> --
> Greg Larkin
> http://www.sourcehosting.net/
> http://www.FreeBSD.org/ - The Power To Serve

Hi Greg,

I think your patch is great.
Please commit it.
Thanks.

BR,
Sunpoet.

-- 
                              Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@sunpoet.net>
